name: Holon Co.,Ltd.
summary: Holon Co.,Ltd. engages in the development, manufacture, marketing, and maintenance of semiconductor circuitry dimension measurement and inspection tools in Japan. The company offers photomask critical dimension-scanning electron microscopes (SEMs), wafer CD-SEMs, defect review SEMs, pattern transfer equipment for LED production, and roller mold measurement tools. Its products are used in fabricating semiconductors. The company was founded in 1985 and is headquartered in Tokorozawa, Japan. As of June 22, 2018, Holon Co.,Ltd. operates as a subsidiary of A&D Company, Limited.
